textByHashes.16467b2361070929c5e477582f501932a42cd29d: Maybe I'll... No, stupid idea Guss!
textByHashes.9c33fd3d77b9764b5609476adfa3ec3117ad6195: What am I going to do?
textByHashes.d0a7836a2207ea90c934e933262f73bf77cacf21: Hmm, I wonder... I could use a hand with something actually.
textByHashes.70929a0e9ef1d2639d3534bab70a99c554a8d155: You're willing to help? Great stuff.
textByHashes.e50d0b4a1749c3179d16a80b68d1efc66f6202d7: The name is Guss, Guss Mistletoad. You see that portal over there?
textByHashes.d695c6ee10a193aae6f4bad9a0a7b4f7a3894b05: That's the portal to The Nutcracker pub. It's been a dream of mine to get inside.
textByHashes.5a088865d4efc18753e1edcb204bbf595f531344: Poor innocent Player, you can't just do that! It's Santa's prized pub, only a select few can enter.
textByHashes.f85130b8c408ae50c6e2136f935eb3ff43557df0: You have to win the Festive Games of course. It's a series of games to determine who is the most festive in the land.
textByHashes.e3c6fb888aa491b718ef36c9b140ed291d1697e0: Yes! But I'm not good at them. I can never get past the final. That's where I'm hoping you can help! Let's rig it.
textByHashes.4325bd31f4fe2b5071c53041939cd29cf0a7e6e0: If there's any left after I'm done!
textByHashes.97f0c7a6c2cb62d684e314816e813327f4f9f2be: First off we need to nab ourselves some game times from Santa.
textByHashes.86df0c90558e8bac2e9adee38ae7c4c9927aec3e: You've got to do this Player, but be very vague as to why you need two entry times.
textByHashes.bc556909495b3915792fa16b30707b25a2f741ec: As I mentioned before, I've taken part in these games many times before. Failing every single time.
textByHashes.1495aa22c8225abd34f02282896bb11d3e2e5ce6: Let's say I'm not exactly on the nice list at the moment.
textByHashes.c8dc48c1bb0ebbef04938a9f4ab188ed8c2957b9: Thanks Player, I'm so excited for an all-I-can-drink beer-fest.
textByHashes.5f2955dee06ac6f34843cbcdd3d450e21177d1f3: What a lovely person you are Player! I do love a backstory!
textByHashes.f2fb5d0dcedf1c390d85301e24a6f939824bf616: Let's paint a picture for you...
textByHashes.7eafcb438b7f3cb5339c0e1dd21ae9006db73395: It was a frosty morning in the month of Bennath, around twenty one years go...
textByHashes.50e5306aecd4a579c3115811941bd73e95596eb8: I'd just left my friend Doric's house after 'borrowing' some ore to take back to the mines.
textByHashes.53d59e4dea93dede498c9179cee42af16f9ce104: Off to work I go.. Hi ho, h-
textByHashes.dd68402d26487fd5b8e669dca39095db8a454d17: Anyway, I went to work and as you can probably tell, I work in the Dwarven Mines.
textByHashes.2e822a4ae5c1c32ed4efdc55df00b55aec3ae0e2: One day I got really thirsty, I hadn't consumed an alcoholic beverage in over five minutes.
textByHashes.dc5561e98d3bec454bafc278fafa723d686236a7: So I went out in search of the nearest pub.
textByHashes.8824de825480620c11aef4a3b00a7af9fc819bd2: For some unknown reason I saw this portal, same as you see it today.
textByHashes.ad2b3753716a89503df79a595eab795383811290: It's the middle of Bennath, why does it look so Christmassy? I thought to myself.
textByHashes.3278cb1aa8fe8f705009d133dea7fa178bc12802: Turns out there'd been a mix up...
textByHashes.edc67b001938a06d7e5be41244ec944639b66ca8: Long story short, I got chatting to Santa and he told me about the games and the amazing Nutcracker pub.
textByHashes.3c341e890e9b9bb9a2e4259955dd286024c7e008: From that day on I was determined to gain access to this pub!
textByHashes.718c8c5a350d48a86be36f2fbe9a5fa5551ca91a: Oh, there's one finite detail I missed out.
textByHashes.fa42a804e3fc8144578500855901b2919c8e48e9: The Nutcracker has a FREE BAR!
textByHashes.7080b2e06a8489293d0f82bbda05019eff8d3da7: Some of the folk passing through felt a bit sorry for me after all these years, so they made me this cool jumper and hat to keep me warm.
textByHashes.b0860efbcf97d19bbd600f8c4fc0fdc21ab84c6b: Annoyingly, the games change every year.
textByHashes.072dfc9487c9c78752b3c71456b45553fabfdef6: But I can tell you what I know.
textByHashes.281e0cec10c3aed76c46b07bc0d656558c990d8d: Santa runs these games like a tournament. You win one, you move onto the next game.
textByHashes.18e978aecf149ddc782f27951faee1e2945d75e3: There are two games total, and then the final!
textByHashes.57545240398f587dec407b29a7e596edab8e20ec: For a small dwarf like me, the hardest thing I've ever played.
textByHashes.48694775eecd83d95876b83fd15044f2faf15e6f: But for you it'll be a piece of cake!
textByHashes.3a6213eed923b2e660567a708712d19ec049a364: Amazing, Santa didn't suspect a thing?
textByHashes.4834f719554d5e285bf160f3b95772e8579b9124: Oh no, this can't be happening. That puts a right spanner in the works.
textByHashes.ce806e6c0290d81c83f2bd2ffea69ff6407c2b5d: Of course! How silly of me, you'd have thought I would remember that after twenty one years of playing these games.
textByHashes.4abdef96b763b9840f02d5f86df669c13c2c767e: Silly , I'll cheat of course. I gave up my festive games morals long ago.
textByHashes.100cdee2d10f3bb7269cefcd97cc5c6cfa330d1f: Good luck I've got snow doubts you'll do great!
textByHashes.777ff754410e8676b19b4190775a6efd277f4538: Amazing job getting here so far by the way. I had absolute faith in you!
textByHashes.c58ad443750d803065f4135971165b798b869a23: This last game is a blood bath.
textByHashes.52e53e2ac85bbb6b4371c175b2b72b2ee077dcc0: I may or may not have played all these games before, and just not told you.
textByHashes.938c13137f429118fc5fb606f99ebf0d7b40e737: Nope. It might have put you off!
textByHashes.3caa334cbfd1fb3082bf246e00235d298801abcf: The aim of the game is to eliminate all the other players.
textByHashes.cf608592df76e8a43be5d4b26682d96353cf7286: Do you see those snowball piles scattered about?
textByHashes.c367f0db6f47dd9bf2bae502167e56a551b417cf: Awesome, you'll want to stock up as many as you can. Then take no prisoners.
textByHashes.1ad4b9d2f5fcf9ff637486b960f00f5dc332a43d: Last player standing is the winner, it's simple really.
textByHashes.48e46c636de450eedf614e9441b8bfbfc7dea77d: Be quick! I can already taste that sweet nectar of the gods.
textByHashes.464a2e7cc0f3c783be29ba472864e64a653cb28f: I knew they you in let.
textByHashes.5e0a7e7259c898978ae03cdb9624fbe0530e3e1f: No, no, must have been another dwarf, plenty round these parts.
textByHashes.47c283357e4da30c363e37c9353dc27348424e7e: No of course not, I'm just playing mind games with poor . They have no chance.
textByHashes.656fa4aabd5cb37665db4281a8bb59873d498086: My bad... I'm just very eager.
textByHashes.b066be2355675ad764c2e5765ccad74a24cbed21: Honestly... I'm just an awful shot.
textByHashes.c299ec1d2ae2d04cfffbe4154769bfd69e0651a2: I don't know what to say.
textByHashes.66256c309df9bed9177bce66016bd859f7ff68bd: we can go into the pub together!
